title: Umbra Poor Ores Create Addon
description: Adds Create generator to Umbra Poor Ores
body:
Create addon for Umbra Poor Ores

Adds Create generator:
Generates Poor iron, copper, zinc and gold,

Also adds recipes for Create Zinc ore made from Poor Ore materials.

Requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Umbra Poor Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/umbra-poor-ores)
